description: Style Note Look trendy and smart with these grey and orange shoes from gliders. This pair features an orange detailing that adds a dash of colour and fun quotient. The TPU sole is sure to protect your feet all day, so just lace up and start your daily walk or jog. You can use it for casual outings too. Product Details Round toed grey shoe with decorative stitch and mesh details on the upper and central lace-upsPadded inner and footbedSoft and padded tongue with branding Upper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with lugsBranding at the back of the collar Material and Care Synthetic Remove dust with a dry clean cloth
